description: Search and publishing competition is high for strategic frameworks and educational explainers
Surface-level content entry is easy but governed systems with repositories are harder to replicate
AI summaries videos courses forums and internal systems can satisfy parts of the same audience need
Search CMS hosting analytics and AI-tool dependencies create supplier power and platform risk
Readers can compare alternatives and switch instantly which increases trust and value pressure
Vague example included to test weak specificity market-boundary evidence and governance review
